note: INTEL-06 (Phase 9, 09-04) labelled calibration reference set — 09-AI-SPEC §5.7. Schema: see calibration/README.md and lib/intelligence/calibration.ts (CalibrationCase). Image sources support BOTH committed/local file paths ({type:'local', path}) and PRIVATE Vercel Blob pathnames ({type:'blob', pathname}). Cases with todo:true are unlabelled coverage slots the QA lead + senior render operator must fill; cases with provisional:true carry ENGINEER-provisional anchor labels pending QA-lead review — agreement computed over provisional labels is NON-trust-gating (the loop stays recommend-only).
target: 12-20 labelled cases minimum 12 (09-AI-SPEC §5.7); coverage: known-good ring99 + known-bad zanessa, >=1 each white/yellow/rose metal, >=1 each hero/front/top/profile angle, >=1 each failure mode (milky, white-gold-as-chrome, blown highlights, flat metal, holdout fringing, floating product), 1 empty/black adversarial

cases.notes: The proven catalog reference: 77-facet classic round on a white band, crisp facet mosaic, clean white sweep. Engineer-provisional labels — QA lead to confirm.
postprod_v149d goalcut 'balanced' variant — known-good hero shot, white metal. Engineer-provisional.

Known-bad zanessa metal pass (job cmq7ya73o0008kz040mv9ft3u): mis-framed, scattered fragments — a grouping/token failure, NOT fixable by light knobs (iron law: broken holdout => propose NO deltas). Engineer-provisional — senior operator to confirm gates.

Known-bad zanessa stone pass (job cmq7ya73o0009kz04gxfjrt2e): scattered fragments on what should be a clean transparent stone layer. contactShadow labelled 3 = N/A on a transparent stone pass. Engineer-provisional.
Known-bad zanessa metal pass, front angle (job cmq7ya73q000akz0400qdkmnw): mis-framed scattered fragments. Engineer-provisional.

Known-bad zanessa stone pass, front angle (job cmq7ya73q000bkz04flargbxk): near-empty scattered fragments — labelled with BOTH brokenHoldout and emptyOrBroken. Engineer-provisional — senior operator to confirm whether emptyOrBroken applies here or only brokenHoldout.
Structurally-empty adversarial frame (committed fixture, pure black 768x768): expects emptyOrBroken=true, escalate, NO deltas (09-AI-SPEC §5.7 adversarial slot).

cases.coverage: known-good YELLOW gold render (hero or front) — D3 warm-hue risk profile
cases.notes: QA lead: pick a shipped yellow-gold catalog render, label all 8 dimensions 1-5, the verdict, gates (all false expected) and delta signs (0s expected).

cases.coverage: known-good ROSE gold render (any angle) — the pink-vs-yellow D3 hue check
cases.notes: QA lead: pick a shipped rose-gold render and label it.

cases.coverage: TOP angle case (good or bad) — D5 symmetry + D7 centering emphasis
cases.notes: QA lead: any top-view preview; label fully.

cases.coverage: PROFILE angle case (good or bad) — D2/D3 emphasis, stone asymmetry NOT penalized
cases.notes: QA lead: any profile-view preview; label fully.

cases.coverage: MILKY diamond failure — uniform pale wash, no facet structure (the #1 failure)
cases.notes: Senior operator: pick a milky preview (e.g. an over-lit world-strength sweep frame). Expected: flags.milky=true, D1=1, expectDeltaSign worldStrength=-1 and/or cardDarkness=-1, exposure NEVER +1 (the anti-pattern this set exists to catch).

cases.coverage: WHITE-GOLD-AS-CHROME failure — pure-white/chrome metal, wrongMetal gate
BLOWN HIGHLIGHTS failure — large clipped white blobs, silhouette dissolving
cases.notes: Senior operator: expected flags.blownHighlights=true, D2=1, expectDeltaSign exposure=-1.

cases.coverage: FLAT/plastic metal failure — D3<=2 without milky; fixed with darker cards, never +worldStrength
cases.notes: Senior operator: expected D3=2, expectDeltaSign cardDarkness=-1, worldStrength=0 or -1 (NEVER +1).

cases.coverage: FLOATING product failure — missing/absent contact shadow, D6 low
cases.notes: Senior operator: expected D6<=2, expectDeltaSign contactShadow=+1.

cases.coverage: HOLDOUT FRINGING failure — dark fringe/halo on a stone-pass alpha edge (escalate, distinct from the zanessa scattered-fragment cases)
cases.notes: Senior operator: expected flags.brokenHoldout=true, D8=1, expectVerdict escalate, all delta signs 0.
